input.code:
# Load required packages
library(DESeq2)
library(ggplot2)

# Load counts and metadata
counts <- read.csv('counts_de.csv', row.names=1, check.names=FALSE)
metadata <- read.csv('metadata_de.csv', row.names=1)

cat("Counts matrix:", nrow(counts), "genes ×", ncol(counts), "cells\n")
cat("Metadata:\n")
print(table(metadata$cell_type))

# Convert counts to integer matrix (DESeq2 requirement)
counts <- as.matrix(counts)
mode(counts) <- "integer"

# Create DESeqDataSet
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = counts,
  colData = metadata,
  design = ~ cell_type
)

cat("\nDESeqDataSet created:\n")
print(dds)
